items.name: Atomblaster 777
items.description: Send your enemies flying with an invisible blast of air!

items.name: Ice Blue Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Be blue cool when you’re rolling.  Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys while leaving snow behind you. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Deluxe Green Roped
items.description: This stylish green roped will keep you traveling in deluxe style. It moves faster than the red roped and does sweet jumps with more ease than ever before.

items.name: Poisoned Skeleton Scythe
items.description: Dangerous to anyone who get's hit. In addition to the slash damage, there is a 25% change of poisoning anyone you hit. If poisoned your foe will be unable to jump and can only walk at half speed.

items.name: RC Tank
items.description: This remote control tank comes equipped with real explosives!  Drive around and blow things up.  Your foes will never see you coming!

items.name: Green Laser Scythe
items.description: Slash this powerful laser scythe to do 30 damage per hit.  Click and hold to do some sweet animated swinging that will unleash a laser projectile that does damage to anything in its path.

items.name: Mariachi Guitar
items.description: This is music made for dancing!

items.name: Cymbals
items.description: Clash!  Slam these babies together to make a loud sound!  Does no damage.

items.name: Saw Sword
items.description: Those trees had it coming!

items.name: Carrot Slingshot
items.description: Sling deadly carrots at your enemies!! Click to release the string and launch a carrot in the direction of your cursor. Roughly 10 damage is dealt to any enemies hit.

items.name: Flaming Dragon Slayer Bo Staff
items.description: Made from the talons of previously slayed dragons.  How he slayed the first one, I'll never know!

items.name: Civil War Artillery
items.description: Equip and click this gear to drop a real live cannon in front of you.  Control the cannons direction with the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' keys - lift and lower it with the cannon with the 'Q' and 'E' keys.  When you've got your shot set up - sit on the cannon and click! Hitting the 'X' key will remove it from the map.

items.name: Gamaboi
items.description: Play the fabulous Quest for Glory 2! 3 ultimate boss fights will challenge you to your very core!

items.name: Fortune Cookie
items.description: Nom nom nom... A mysterious stranger will be the key to my success?  Silly cookie...cookies are for eating...not prophesying...

items.name: Frozen Blue Ice Crossbow
items.description: Fire ice cold arrows at your foes, which will occasionally freeze them upon hit. Each hit does 20 damage.

items.name: Dragon Warrior Spear
items.description: Ryuuzoku, the dragon people of the north, are extensively trained in all forms of combat. This spear is awarded only to their fiercest warriors.

items.name: Race the Sunset
items.description: Another original ROBLOX 2D game.  Can you beat the sunset?

items.name: Deluxe Pirate Hook
items.description: For the pirate who lives life with flair.  Click to swing this stylish pirate hook at your enemies; dealing 12 damage per hit.

items.name: Stun Grenade
items.description: The stun grenade causes temporary paralysis to all those in the blast radius, and does 20 damage points to surrounding enemies.

items.name: Patriot's Monster Truck
items.description: It is your duty to drive over all other RC cars. Anything less would be Un-American.
